records.title: BaZi strength and useful-element method summary
records.summary: A curated summary record for BaZi analysis: evaluate day-master strength, seasonal context, visible and hidden stems, ten-god distribution, and balancing hypotheses before making any symbolic interpretation.
records.caution: This record is method metadata for software validation only; it is not a predictive claim and does not replace practitioner review.

records.title: Zi Wei palace and transformation method summary
records.summary: A curated summary record for Zi Wei analysis: inspect palace themes, major periods, transformation markers, and cross-palace interactions while preserving source and provider boundaries.
records.caution: This record is a copyright-safe metadata fixture for provider integration and report grounding tests.

records.title: Qi Men gate and palace timing method summary
records.summary: A curated summary record for Qi Men analysis: treat gate, palace, star, spirit, and timing markers as symbolic timing evidence that must be reconciled with other specialist reports.
records.caution: This record supports deterministic framework tests and must not be presented as production-grade Qi Men calculation evidence.
